message:
chore(artifacts): regenerate section 10.17 certification report (83 tests)

Regenerate after adding constant-time expected_output_hash comparison
check. Test count bumped from 82 to 83, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
